introSection: Ice Dragon is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer Wisdom Rides currently owned by UK showman Billy Bernard Hill. It originally operated at Old Town from 1991 to 2008.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports. Used to be pink track and supports when at Old Town.

fullText:
Ice Dragon is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer Wisdom Rides currently owned by UK showman Billy Bernard Hill. It originally operated at Old Town from 1991 to 2008.



Blue track and supports. Used to be pink track and supports when at Old Town.
